full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: find the research papers as per the requirements of the part A submission
full_llm_interaction_log.full_prompt: I am looking for peer-reviewed research papers published between 2009 and 2012 (inclusive) from the classical machine learning era, whose primary technical contribution is based on ARIMA/ARMA/SARIMA or state-space time-series variants, Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM) or EM-based clustering and mixture model variants, or Support Vector Machines (SVM) and kernel methods or their variants, and which are published in CORE A* venues (NeurIPS, ICML, JMLR, AISTATS, IEEE TPAMI, AAAI, IJCAI, CVPR, ICCV, ECCV, ACL, EMNLP, KDD, ICDM, ICDE), with the paper being a full conference or journal paper (not workshop, thesis, blog, technical report, arXiv-only, unpublished, dataset, benchmark, or system-only paper), and for each paper the output must include title, authors, year, venue, CORE ranking confirmation, method used (ARIMA/GMM/SVM), why it is a primary technical contribution, and a publisher or DOI link.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: not helped at all most of them are not relevent as per the constraings, and also very hard to implements and some are with liscensed datasets

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Finding the relevent papers accoring the requirments
full_llm_interaction_log.full_prompt: find 20 research papers on Time-Series Models published by any CORE A* conference/journal publication, and must published between 2009 - 2012 (inclusive)
full_llm_interaction_log.llm_response_summary: compiled list of 20 research papers on Time-Series Models (including modeling, similarity, classification, motifs/shapelets, forecasting, periodicity, anomaly/motif discovery, compression, prediction, and related techniques for time series data) published in CORE A venues between 2009 and 2012 inclusive.*
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped narrow the search to strictly eligible classical Time-Series papers.

full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped narrow the search to strictly eligible classical SVM papers.

full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped narrow the search to strictly eligible classical GMM papers.
